title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・キーワード①

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh-hoho! I must say, I did fabulously well today,
don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
With my elegance, cracking open sea urchins
bare-handed is but a trifle! Oh-hohoho!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You showed superb technique on the track today,
Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sup, Flash! And thanks! You were pretty
shipshape yourself!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Even the beastly great white shark would've
chickened out after seeing you!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you... By the way, as promised, I have
something for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Here. Please take it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This is... a piece of paper with "UM" written on it.
What does it mean?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. I am not at liberty to elaborate. Now,
if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Seriously? She's just gonna run off after that?
"UM"? That's about how I feel right now. What
even is this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The paper Gold Ship received from Eishin Flash
last time mentioned a four-part puzzle to solve.
choice_data_list:
Maybe it's part of the puzzle for Eden's
location?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Oh yeah! The Eden puzzle thing! That totally
slipped my mind!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So basically, it's like: run in races, get clues, do
somethin' else, profit!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I like the sound of that. It seems fun! All right, I'm
gonna do my best to get all four clues!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Gold Ship and I eat lunch in the
cafeteria. I'm mid-bite, when...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Fun fact time! Do you know how many seeds are
on a strawberry?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The answer is... somewhere between 100 and
500.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, I'm really in the mood for
strawberries today! ♪ Hang on, I'm gonna go nab
a strawberry mille-feuille before they run out!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sweet! There's one left! Good timing, me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! There's still one left! Today must be my lucky
day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship and Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh?
Hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you're planning to steal my precious
pastry?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? That's totally my line. Like, get out of
my way.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No way, Jose! I'm not letting you have it, not on
my pride!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know what? Looking back, you've always
been doing stuff like this to me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Like that time you argued with me about the
perfect temperature for hot milk, or that other
time about the correct angle to wear a beret.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You even fought me on the number of bumps on
a bitter melon and how spicy chicken wing sauce
should be.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I straight up don't remember any of that
happening. Like, ever.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It appears our stars are destined to always clash...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, enough skirting around our fate with these
petty scuffles! If we must fight, then it shall be a
battle for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Let's settle this on the racecourse, Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What? We're racing?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I never can tell what's going through your head. You're gonna drive me crazy...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But you know what? Fine. If you're gonna get in
my face, I'll make you seriously regret it. For real.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, you're "for real" now, huh? All right, give
me your best shot!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Just so you know, there's no way I'll lose to you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ditto that! Prepare to meet your doom!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't even look away for one minute without
things going sideways...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's good to see Gold Ship sharing a heated
rivalry. I'll do what I can to support her.
